zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Stockport於1291年出生在英國爾伊頓時，她的父親Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockport31歲，母親Cecilia de Huxlegh26歲。她於1310年與Nicholas de Eton在英國爾波易頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1332年在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年41歲。

zh-hans.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Stockport于1291年出生在英国爾伊頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockport31岁，母亲Cecilia de Huxlegh26岁。她于1310年与Nicholas de Eton在英国爾波易頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1332年在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stockport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stopford
meanings: English: locative name from Stockport (Cheshire), which is recorded as Stokeport in 1188, Stockford in 1283–8, Stopford in 1347, Stoppord in 1337, and Stapporte in 1583.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Stockport was born in 1291, in Eaton, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockport, was 31 and her mother, Cecilia de Huxlegh, was 26. She married Nicholas de Eton in 1310, in Poynton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1332, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Stockport est née en 1291, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockport, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Cecilia de Huxlegh, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas d’Eton en 1310, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1332, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Stockport 1291 in Eaton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockport 31 und ihre Mutter Cecilia de Huxlegh 26. Sie hat 1310 in Poynton, Cheshire, England Nicholas de Eton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1332 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Stockport è nata il nel 1291 nel Eaton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockport, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Cecilia de Huxlegh, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Eton nel 1310, nel Poynton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1332, nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.Poynton, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアポイントン

ja.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Stockportが1291年にイギリスチェシュアイアエアトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockportは31歳，母Cecilia de Huxleghは26歳であった。1310年にイギリスチェシュアイアポイントンでNicholas de Etonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1332年にイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Stockport(이)가 1291년 영국 체실르 이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockport(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecilia de Huxlegh(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1310년 영국 체실르 포이턴에서 Nicholas de Eton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1332년 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Stockport nasceu em 1291, em Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockport, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia de Huxlegh, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Eton em 1310, em Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1332, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Stockport родилась в 1291 г. в местности эатон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockport было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Cecilia de Huxlegh, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Eton в 1310 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1332 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Stockport nació en 1291, en Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard de Stockport - Third Baron Stockport, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Cecilia de Huxlegh, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Eton en 1310, en Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1332, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
